564 CHMTHRPY_DSCHRG_CD CHMTHRPY_DSCHRG_CD Treatment: Chemotherapy (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
